summary: Ticket D Part 2: Agreement Templates UI testing complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend AgreementFormDrawer properly displays submission data in view mode with VERIFIED badge, completion date, mode, and all form fields populated from form_data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agreement Templates UI is fully functional. The AgreementFormDrawer component correctly handles both create and view modes. In view mode, it fetches submission data via GET /api/agreement-submissions/{id} and populates all form fields from form_data. The VERIFIED badge shows completion date and mode.

agreement_templates_listing.details: GET /api/agreement-templates returns both ZERO_HOUR_CONTRACT_V1 and EMPLOYEE_HANDBOOK_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_V1

agreement_row_view_button.details: View button appears on verified agreements and opens AgreementFormDrawer in view mode

agreement_drawer_submission_data.details: Drawer displays employee_name, employee_role, all ack_* checkboxes, signature_name from form_data

agreement_drawer_verified_badge.details: VERIFIED badge shown with completion date (2026-04-01) and mode (admin assisted)

export_pdf_button.details: Export PDF button present and opens PDF export in new window

create_agreement_flow.details: Complete button on not-started agreements opens drawer in create mode with pre-filled employee data

completion_mode_selector.details: Three completion modes available: Self Completion, Admin Assisted, Phone Assisted

submit_button.details: Submit Agreement button present in create mode

backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/agreement-templates/{id}: PASS - Returns full template with sections
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-file: PASS - Includes submission_data in agreement rows
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/agreement-submissions/{id}: PASS - Returns submission with form_data and template
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/agreement-submissions/{id}/pdf: PASS - Returns HTML content for PDF export
